ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., EURUSD) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point (Unix timestamp) */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the financial instrument */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the financial instrument */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "spread" INTEGER /* Spread of the financial instrument (in pips) */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume for the given time period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, CSV file, database connection) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the data (e.g., 1 minute, 5 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Highest price at which a buyer is willing to buy the financial instrument */,
  "ask_price" TEXT /* Lowest price at which a seller is willing to sell the financial instrument */,
  "mid_price" TEXT /* Midpoint between the bid and ask prices */,
  "vwap" TEXT /* Volume-Weighted Average Price */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data point (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., EURUSD)
Timestamp of the data point (Unix timestamp)
Opening price of the financial instrument
Highest price of the financial instrument
Lowest price of the financial instrument
Closing price of the financial instrument
Spread of the financial instrument (in pips)
Trading volume for the given time period
Source of the data (e.g., API, CSV file, database connection)
Timeframe of the data (e.g., 1 minute, 5 minutes, 1 hour)
Highest price at which a buyer is willing to buy the financial instrument
Lowest price at which a seller is willing to sell the financial instrument
Midpoint between the bid and ask prices
Status of the data point (e.g., active, archived, deleted)
